# cloudtemple_vpc_static_ip (Resource)

Allocate and manage a VPC static IP on a private network, bound to a virtual machine network adapter MAC address.

To manage this resource you will need the following roles:
  - `vpc_write`
  - `vpc_read`
  - `activity_read`

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Allocate a static IP on a private network with an auto-assigned address,
# bound to a VM network-adapter MAC address.
resource "cloudtemple_vpc_static_ip" "auto" {
  private_network_id = "b2c3d4e5-f678-9012-3456-7890abcdef12"
  mac_address        = "00:50:56:ab:cd:ef"
}

# Allocate a static IP with an explicit desired address and a description.
resource "cloudtemple_vpc_static_ip" "explicit" {
  private_network_id   = "b2c3d4e5-f678-9012-3456-7890abcdef12"
  mac_address          = "00:50:56:ab:cd:f0"
  ip_address           = "10.0.1.50"
  resource_description = "Web server production"
}

# Output the (possibly auto-assigned) address and the VPC it belongs to.
output "static_ip_address" {
  value = cloudtemple_vpc_static_ip.auto.ip_address
}

output "static_ip_vpc_id" {
  value = cloudtemple_vpc_static_ip.auto.vpc_id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `mac_address` (String) The MAC address of the network adapter bound to this static IP. Mutable: updating it issues a PATCH on the static IP.
- `private_network_id` (String) The ID of the private network on which to allocate the static IP. Changing this forces a new resource.

### Optional

- `ip_address` (String) The static IP address. Optional: if omitted it is auto-assigned by the API. The address is not updatable; changing it forces a new resource.
- `resource_description` (String) An optional description of the static IP resource. Mutable via a PATCH on the static IP.

### Read-Only

- `floating_ip_address` (String) The address of the floating IP bound to this static IP, if any.
- `floating_ip_id` (String) The ID of the floating IP bound to this static IP, if any.
- `id` (String) The ID of the static IP.
- `network_adapter_id` (String) The ID of the network adapter associated with this static IP, if any.
- `source` (String) The source of the static IP (one of `xoa`, `vmware`, `custom`).
- `virtual_machine_id` (String) The ID of the virtual machine associated with this static IP, if any.
- `vpc_id` (String) The ID of the VPC this static IP belongs to.
